description.value:
Forest-temper instructions on resin-hardening — the wood-crafters of Askeskog developed a technique for laminating bark strips in hardened resin; a clever armorer found the same method seals out poison just as well as moisture.

Effect: You have poison immunity 5, and you gain an edge on saving throws against inhaled hazards.

Rules: Damage Immunity; Edge; Saving Throw.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of at least quality craft; pine resin from the Askeskog forest and strips of treated bark
